endpoint.description: The Garage Admin API endpoint URL. Can also be set via the GARAGE_ENDPOINT environment variable.

token.description: The Garage Admin API bearer token. Can also be set via the GARAGE_TOKEN environment variable.

block.description: Terraform provider for managing Garage S3 buckets via the Garage Admin API.

global_alias.description: The global alias (name) for the bucket.

id.description: The unique identifier of the bucket.

max_objects.description: Maximum number of objects in the bucket. Leave unset for unlimited.

max_size.description: Maximum size of the bucket in bytes. Leave unset for unlimited.

website_enabled.description: Enable website hosting for this bucket.

website_error_document.description: The error document for website hosting (e.g., 'error.html').

website_index_document.description: The index document for website hosting (e.g., 'index.html').

access_key_id.description: The ID of the access key.

id.description: The unique identifier of the permission (format: bucket_id/access_key_id).

owner.description: Grant owner permission to the access key.

read.description: Grant read permission to the access key.

write.description: Grant write permission to the access key.

block.description: Manages permissions for an access key on a Garage S3 bucket.

id.description: The access key ID. If not provided, one will be generated.

name.description: A human-friendly name for the access key.

secret_access_key.description: The secret access key. If not provided, one will be generated (only available on creation).

bytes.description: Current size of the bucket in bytes.

global_alias.description: The primary global alias (name) of the bucket. Either id or global_alias must be specified.

global_aliases.description: All global aliases for this bucket.

id.description: The unique identifier of the bucket. Either id or global_alias must be specified.

max_objects.description: Maximum number of objects in the bucket.

max_size.description: Maximum size of the bucket in bytes.

objects.description: Current number of objects in the bucket.

website_enabled.description: Whether website hosting is enabled for this bucket.

website_error_document.description: The error document for website hosting.

website_index_document.description: The index document for website hosting.

block.description: Retrieves information about a Garage S3 bucket.
